rows.label: qev031205_MSG0001
rows.name:
Wroooagh! Lavina is gonna be my bride!
I won't forgive the guy who took her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'll beat the crap out of the Earthling
who took Lavina, and I'll marry her!
Wroooagh! I'll absolutely find him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0003
rows.name:
Wroooagh! Lavina got married!
What am I supposed to do now!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0004
rows.name:
...That's it! I'll eat meat
until my stomach's full![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0005
rows.name:
Once I'm full, I'll get sleepy
and forget all the bad stuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0006
rows.name:
Wroooagh! The engagement got
broken off! Is this really
the end for me and Lavina!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0007
rows.name:
...No! That Earthling and
Lavina aren't married yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031205_MSG0008
rows.name:
I won't give up! I'll absolutely
marry Lavina, and I'll eat tons
of meat at our wedding![ST:wait ]
